description: Compare health insurance plans by calculating total annual costs for low, medium, and high healthcare usage scenarios, incorporating deductibles, coinsurance, and out-of-pocket maximums. Identify the most cost-effective plan for each scenario using conditional formatting.

natural_language.prompt: You are helping someone compare health insurance plans during open enrollment. Calculate the total annual cost for each plan under three scenarios: $2,000 in medical costs (low use), $8,000 (medium use), and $25,000 (high use). Consider monthly premiums, deductibles, coinsurance rates, and out-of-pocket maximums. Highlight which plan is cheapest in each scenario.
